source:
# Imports
from pyspark.sql import functions as fn
from pyspark.sql.functions import (
    col,
    concat,
    concat_ws,
    lit,
    to_timestamp,
    current_timestamp,
    date_format,
    hash,
    sha2
lacima_gold_dimriskfactorid_flag = False
lacima_gold_valueupdates_flag = False
%run "DataHubBatchScripts/DEVELOPMENT_TOOLS/get_feature_flags"

#Get Parameter from controldb
import json
db_port = 1433
linked_service_name = "LS_SQL_ELTFrameworkDB"
db_notebookname= "LACIMA_Gold"
linkedServiceProperties = json.loads(mssparkutils.credentials.getPropertiesAll(linked_service_name))
sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
#print(linkedServiceProperties)
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)

db_query ="SELECT A.*,B.NotebookParameterId,B.ParameterType,B.Value  FROM [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK] A LEFT JOIN [CTL].[CFG_NOTEBOOK_PARAMETER] B ON A.NotebookId = B.NotebookId"

df = spark.read.format("jdbc") \
    .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
    .option("query", db_query) \
    .option("accessToken", access_token) \
    .option("encrypt", "true") \
    .option("databaseName", db_name) \
    .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
    .load()

df2 = df.where(df.NotebookPath==db_notebookname)

#display values
display(df)
display(df2)

#Source DataLake storage details
source_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
source_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage container detail
source_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='source_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #internal folder location in container "demodata/demo_aemo"
#source_file = '' #CUSTOMER__full_32a72bd2-bd94-467f-9030-6b9f20dad676_20240204_100201

#Destination DataLake storage details
destination_storage = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_storage').collect()[0]["Value"] #Storage name
destination_container = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_container').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw storage container details
destination_path = df2.where(df2.ParameterType=='destination_path').collect()[0]["Value"] #raw delta file patch

#Get Current Date
Gold_LoadDate=spark.sql("select current_timestamp()").collect()[0][0]

# Display values
print(source_storage)
print(source_container)
print(source_path)
print(destination_storage)
print(destination_container)
print(destination_path)
# Table FactSimulationSet: START

#Set table name
db_tablename="FactSimulationSet"
source_dbname="LACIMA_Silver"
source_tablename="raSimulationSetOutputValue"

if lacima_gold_valueupdates_flag:
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
    (
        raSimulationSetOutputLabelId INT,
        SimNumber INT,
        Date TIMESTAMP,
        DateHashId STRING,
        Year INT,
        Period INT,
        Value DOUBLE,
        raSimulationSetId INT,
        Label STRING,
        PeriodsPerDay INT,
        Details STRING,
        ID INT,
        RiskFactorNames STRING, 
        SPM_Name_ID INT,
        SPM_NameHashId STRING,
        SPM_Category_ID INT,
        SPM_CategoryHashId STRING,
        Firming_GM DOUBLE,
        Renewables_GM DOUBLE,
        Firming_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        Renewables_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        Renewables_MW DOUBLE,
        Firming_MW DOUBLE,
        StorageLoad_MW DOUBLE,
        Renewables_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_Volume DOUBLE,
        Renewables_LGC_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_GM DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        LGC_Price DOUBLE,
        STC_Price DOUBLE,
        Gas_Price DOUBLE,
        Spot_Price DOUBLE,
        Gas_Consumption DOUBLE,
        Retail_MW_1 DOUBLE,
        Retail_MW_2 DOUBLE,
        Outage_Multiplier DOUBLE,
        raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey STRING,
        raSimulationSetOutputValueHashDiff STRING,
        RiskFactorNamesHashId STRING,
        LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        Datetime TIMESTAMP,
        DatePeriodSim STRING,
        DateSim STRING,
        MeasureName STRING,
        PeriodBlock INT,
        Quarter INT,
        YearQuarter STRING,
        Time STRING,
        TimeHashID STRING,
        Month INT,
        YearMonth STRING,
        Value_d DOUBLE
    )
    USING delta
    PARTITIONED BY (Year)
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
    """)

else:
    spark.sql(f"""CREATE DATABASE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname};""")
    spark.sql(f"""
    CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
    (
        raSimulationSetOutputLabelId INT,
        SimNumber INT,
        Date TIMESTAMP,
        DateHashId STRING,
        Year INT,
        Period INT,
        Value DOUBLE,
        raSimulationSetId INT,
        Label STRING,
        PeriodsPerDay INT,
        Details STRING,
        ID INT,
        RiskFactorNames STRING, 
        SPM_Name_ID INT,
        SPM_NameHashId STRING,
        SPM_Category_ID INT,
        SPM_CategoryHashId STRING,
        Firming_GM DOUBLE,
        Renewables_GM DOUBLE,
        Firming_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        Renewables_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        Renewables_MW DOUBLE,
        Firming_MW DOUBLE,
        StorageLoad_MW DOUBLE,
        Renewables_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_Volume DOUBLE,
        Renewables_LGC_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_GM DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_Revenue DOUBLE,
        Firming_LGC_GM_Cost DOUBLE,
        LGC_Price DOUBLE,
        STC_Price DOUBLE,
        Gas_Price DOUBLE,
        Spot_Price DOUBLE,
        Gas_Consumption DOUBLE,
        Retail_MW_1 DOUBLE,
        Retail_MW_2 DOUBLE,
        Outage_Multiplier DOUBLE,
        raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey STRING,
        raSimulationSetOutputValueHashDiff STRING,
        RiskFactorNamesHashId STRING,
        LoadDate TIMESTAMP,
        Datetime TIMESTAMP,
        DatePeriodSim STRING,
        DateSim STRING,
        MeasureName STRING,
        PeriodBlock INT,
        Quarter INT,
        YearQuarter STRING,
        Time STRING,
        TimeHashID STRING,
        Month INT,
        YearMonth STRING
    )
    USING delta
    PARTITIONED BY (Year)
    LOCATION 'abfss://{destination_container}@{destination_storage}.dfs.core.windows.net/{destination_path}/{db_tablename}'
# Row count parameters
Gold_Insert_Pre=spark.sql(f""" SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} """).collect()[0][0]
# Display
print(Gold_Insert_Pre)

# Create a temporary view of df_Gold
if lacima_gold_valueupdates_flag:
    df_Gold = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT      
        rsv.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,
        rsv.raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey,
        rsv.SimNumber,
        rsv.Date,
        rsv.DateHashId,
        rsv.Year,
        rsv.Period,
        rsv.Value,
        CASE
	        WHEN rsv.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId IN (22375, 22900, 21675, 22200, 21325, 21500, 22025, 22550, 21850, 22725) THEN rsv.Value * -1
            ELSE rsv.Value
        END AS Value_cost,
        rsl.raSimulationSetId,
        rsl.Label,
        rsl.PeriodsPerDay,
        rsl.Details,
        rsl.RiskFactorNamesHashId,
        lrf.ID,
        lrf.RiskFactorNames, 
        lrf.SPM_Name_ID,
        lrf.SPM_NameHashId,
        lrf.SPM_Category_ID,
        lrf.SPM_CategoryHashId,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value >= 0 THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value < 0 THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS StorageLoad_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_Volume,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_LGC_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS LGC_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('STC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS STC_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Gas_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Spot_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Consumption') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Gas_Consumption,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 1') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Retail_MW_1,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 2') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Retail_MW_2,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Outage') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Outage_Multiplier,
        LoadDate,
        DATEADD(MINUTE, (rsv.Period)*30, rsv.Date) as Datetime,
        CASE 
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value >= 0 THEN 'Firming_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value < 0 THEN 'StorageLoad_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_Volume'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_LGC_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'LGC_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('STC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'STC_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'Gas_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'Spot_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Consumption') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN 'Gas_Consumption'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 1') THEN 'Retail_MW_1'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 2') THEN 'Retail_MW_2'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Outage') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN 'Outage_Multiplier'
        END AS MeasureName,
        CASE 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD < 19 THEN 1 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD < 31 THEN 2 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD <45 THEN 3 
            ELSE 1 
        END AS PeriodBlock,
        dt.Quarter,
        CONCAT(rsv.Year,'-',dt.Quarter) as YearQuarter,
        dt.Month
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} rsv
    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.rasimulationsetoutputlabel rsl on rsv.raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId = rsl.raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.SPM_LacimaRiskFactor lrf on rsl.RiskFactorNamesHashId = lrf.RiskFactorNamesHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.spm_category cat on lrf.SPM_CategoryHashId = cat.SPM_CategoryHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.spm_name nam on lrf.SPM_NameHashId = nam.SPM_NameHashId
    LEFT JOIN dimtables_gold.dimdate dt on rsv.DateHashID = dt.DateHashID;
    """)

else:
    df_Gold = spark.sql(f"""
    SELECT      
        rsv.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,
        rsv.raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey,
        rsv.SimNumber,
        rsv.Date,
        rsv.DateHashId,
        rsv.Year,
        rsv.Period,
        rsv.Value,
        rsl.raSimulationSetId,
        rsl.Label,
        rsl.PeriodsPerDay,
        rsl.Details,
        rsl.RiskFactorNamesHashId,
        lrf.ID,
        lrf.RiskFactorNames, 
        lrf.SPM_Name_ID,
        lrf.SPM_NameHashId,
        lrf.SPM_Category_ID,
        lrf.SPM_CategoryHashId,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value >= 0 THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value < 0 THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS StorageLoad_MW,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_Volume,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Renewables_LGC_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_GM,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_Revenue,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Firming_LGC_GM_Cost,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS LGC_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('STC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS STC_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Gas_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Spot_Price,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Consumption') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Gas_Consumption,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 1') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Retail_MW_1,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 2') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Retail_MW_2,
        CASE
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Outage') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN rsv.Value
            ELSE 0
        END AS Outage_Multiplier,
        LoadDate,
        DATEADD(MINUTE, (rsv.Period)*30, rsv.Date) as Datetime,
        CASE 
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value >= 0 THEN 'Firming_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') AND rsv.Value < 0 THEN 'StorageLoad_MW'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_Volume'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Renewables') THEN 'Renewables_LGC_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_GM'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Revenue') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_Revenue'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('GM_Cost') AND UPPER(cat.Category4) = UPPER('Firming') THEN 'Firming_LGC_GM_Cost'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('LGC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'LGC_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('STC') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'STC_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'Gas_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Price') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Spot') THEN 'Spot_Price'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Gas') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Consumption') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN 'Gas_Consumption'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 1') THEN 'Retail_MW_1'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Electricity') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Retail') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') AND UPPER(nam.StationName) = UPPER('Retail Volume 2') THEN 'Retail_MW_2'
            WHEN UPPER(cat.Category1) = UPPER('Outage') AND UPPER(cat.Category2) = UPPER('Generation') AND UPPER(cat.Category3) = UPPER('Volume') THEN 'Outage_Multiplier'
        END AS MeasureName,
        CASE 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD < 19 THEN 1 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD < 31 THEN 2 
            WHEN rsv.PERIOD <45 THEN 3 
            ELSE 1 
        END AS PeriodBlock,
        dt.Quarter,
        CONCAT(rsv.Year,'-',dt.Quarter) as YearQuarter,
        dt.Month
    FROM {source_dbname}.{source_tablename} rsv
    LEFT JOIN {source_dbname}.rasimulationsetoutputlabel rsl on rsv.raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId = rsl.raSimulationSetOutputLabelHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.SPM_LacimaRiskFactor lrf on rsl.RiskFactorNamesHashId = lrf.RiskFactorNamesHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.spm_category cat on lrf.SPM_CategoryHashId = cat.SPM_CategoryHashId
    LEFT JOIN SharePoint_Silver.spm_name nam on lrf.SPM_NameHashId = nam.SPM_NameHashId
    LEFT JOIN dimtables_gold.dimdate dt on rsv.DateHashID = dt.DateHashID;

# Write using AAD Auth to internal table
# Add required imports
import com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics
from com.microsoft.spark.sqlanalytics.Constants import Constants
from pyspark.sql.functions import col, concat, lit, to_timestamp,current_timestamp,date_format, to_date, when

df_batchIds=spark.sql(f"""
                    SELECT DISTINCT Year
                        FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename}
                    ORDER BY Year
                    """).collect()

ids = sorted([i[0] for i in df_batchIds])
ids = list(set(ids))

for i,ids in enumerate(ids):
    print(i,ids)
    if i==0:
        #firt batch is overwirte to cleanup the data
        load_type = "overwrite"
    else:
        load_type = "append"

    df_gold=spark.sql(f"""
                    SELECT  rl.raSimulationSetOutputLabelId,
                            rl.SimNumber,
                            rl.Date,
                            rl.DateHashId,
                            rl.Year,
                            rl.Period,
                            rl.Value,
                            rl.raSimulationSetId,
                            rl.Label,
                            rl.PeriodsPerDay,
                            rl.Details,
                            rl.ID,
                            rl.RiskFactorNames, 
                            rl.SPM_Name_ID,
                            rl.SPM_NameHashId,
                            rl.SPM_Category_ID,
                            rl.SPM_CategoryHashId,
                            rl.Renewables_MW,
                            rl.Firming_MW,
                            rl.Retail_MW_1,
                            rl.Retail_MW_2,
                            rl.Renewables_GM_Cost,
                            rl.Firming_GM_Cost,
                            rl.StorageLoad_MW,
                            rl.LGC_Price,
                            rl.Spot_Price,
                            rl.Gas_Price,
                            rl.STC_Price,
                            rl.raSimulationSetOutputValueHashKey,
                            rl.raSimulationSetOutputValueHashDiff
                        FROM {db_notebookname}.{db_tablename} rl
                        WHERE rl.Year = {ids}
                    """)
    # Configure and submit the request to write to Synapse Dedicated SQL Pool
    # Sample below is using AAD-based authentication approach; See further examples to leverage SQL Basic auth.
    (df_gold.write
    # If `Constants.SERVER` is not provided, the `<database_name>` from the three-part table name argument
    # to `synapsesql` method is used to infer the Synapse Dedicated SQL End Point.
    .option(Constants.SERVER, "cql-dev-datahub-synapse01.sql.azuresynapse.net")
    # Like-wise, if `Constants.TEMP_FOLDER` is not provided, the connector will use the runtime staging directory config (see section on Configuration Options for details).
    .option(Constants.TEMP_FOLDER, (f"""abfss://temp@cqldevdatahubsynapse.dfs.core.windows.net/{db_tablename}"""))
    # Choose a save mode that is apt for your use case.
    # Options for save modes are "error" or "errorifexists" (default), "overwrite", "append", "ignore".
    # refer to https://spark.apache.org/docs/latest/sql-data-sources-load-save-functions.html#save-modes
    .mode(load_type)
    # Required parameter - Three-part table name to which data will be written
    .synapsesql(f"""cqldevdatahubdsql01.dbo.{db_tablename}"""))
#Row count parameters

sql_server_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Endpoint')
db_name = linkedServiceProperties.get('Database')
access_token = mssparkutils.credentials.getConnectionStringOrCreds(linked_service_name)
write_table_name = "[CTL].[CFG_INGESTION_LOGS]"

try:
    df_log.write.format("jdbc") \
        .option("url", "jdbc:sqlserver://%s:%s" % (sql_server_name, db_port)) \
        .option("dbtable", write_table_name) \
        .option("accessToken", access_token) \
        .option("encrypt", "true") \
        .option("databaseName", db_name) \
        .option("hostNameInCertificate", "*.database.windows.net") \
        .mode("append") \
        .save()
except ValueError as error :
    print("MSSQL Connector write failed", error)

print("MSSQL Connector write(append) succeeded  ")
